narrative:
Brown Twp (precinct in Paulding County) has 1,190 registered voters, with 52.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.3 percentage points.
